name: Brutalist
description: Pure white background, ink black text, pure red accent. Arial Black / Impact style. Zero decoration, maximum contrast. Bold statements, hot takes, satire.

typography.note: Bebas Neue is single-weight (400) — all-caps by default. Use enormous font sizes (140–180px) and tight line-height (0.95). Red is used ONLY for one or two words — never full sentences. Borders and underlines in black, thick (6–10px). No gradients, no shadows, no rounded corners. Hard cuts only.

css.hed: font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-weight:400; font-size:140px; color:#000000; line-height:0.95; letter-spacing:2px;
css.capText: font-family:'Bebas Neue',sans-serif; font-size:36px; font-weight:400; color:#000000; padding:0 140px; line-height:1.2;
